title: Query Garden R Wrapper Example
text:
source("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/r/querygarden.R")

query_garden_emit_sql_block(
  "select * from regions;",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "postgresql"
)

select * from regions;

title: Query Garden R Wrapper Example

title: Query Garden R Wrapper Example
text:
Generated From A SQL File
query_garden_emit_sql_block_from_file(
  "sample-query.sql",
  db = "hr",
  dialect = "mysql"
)

select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;

title: Query Garden Revealjs Example
text:

select department_id, department_name, location_id
from departments

title: Query Garden
text: Query Garden turns ordinary SQL code blocks into browser-run examples backed by sqlime. The queries below run against the bundled HR sample database.

title: Query Garden
Query Garden
text:
Dialect Styling

select employee_id, first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;

title: Query Garden
text:
Chunk-Registered Database

select department_id, department_name, location_id
from departments
limit 5;

title: Query Garden
text:
Legacy Class Form

select country_id, country_name, region_id
from countries
limit 5;

title: Query Garden Python Wrapper Example
text:
import sys
sys.path.append("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/python")
from querygarden import emit_sql_block

emit_sql_block(
    "select * from regions;",
    db="hr",
    dialect="postgresql",
)

select * from regions;

title: Query Garden Python Wrapper Example
text:
Generated From A SQL File
from querygarden import emit_sql_block_from_file

emit_sql_block_from_file(
    "sample-query.sql",
    db="hr",
    dialect="mysql",
)

select first_name, last_name, job_id
from employees
limit 5;
